3126990.name: Sealubbers
3126990.description:
Sealubbers is a top-down 2D pirate RPG about building a crew, battling ships, and getting rich however you can.

You’ll sail around a weird, lively world picking up crew members with all kinds of personalities and skills. Some are helpful, some chaotic. When you run into trouble (which happens a lot), you’ll fight ship-to-ship, then board the enemy and throw down in full crew sword fights.

It doesn’t take itself too seriously. You’ll stumble across strange quests, make dumb choices, and occasionally strike gold. The world’s alive, your crew is a mess, and nothing ever goes quite as planned.

Wishlist Sealubbers if that sounds like your kind of adventure.
